Technology in EV and manufacturing evolves rapidly. Delayed upgradation can affect efficiency and product competitiveness.
The Company monitors technological trends and evaluates upgrades based on business feasibility and customer needs.
Technology Used for Reduction of Power Consumption
Using energy-efficient machines helps in saving cost and improving sustainability performance.
The Company is assessing high-efficiency equipment and operational improvements to optimize energy usage.
Improper waste disposal can attract penalties and impact the environment. Efficient disposal improves compliance and brand value.
The Company strives to follow waste management norms and works with authorized recyclers as applicable.
Manufacturing and battery operations carry risk of accidents if not properly managed.
The Company maintains standard safety protocols and continuously reviews its practices for improvement.
Impact of Government Policies and Incentives on EV Adoption
Changes in subsidies, tax breaks, and EV policy direction at national/state levels significantly influence EV demand.
The Company keeps abreast of policy changes and evaluates business impact to align product strategies and pricing
AI-Driven Process Optimization in Manufacturing (Both Divisions)
Use of AI and data analytics can reduce downtime, improve precision, and minimize wastage in production.
The Company is assessing potential applications of AI and related technologies to improve production outcomes, subject to feasibility and business priorities.
